words.zh: v. 歡迎( greet的過去式和過去分詞 ); 迎接; 致意; （以某種方式）對…作出反應

words.def: a position on a scale of intensity or amount or quality
words.zh: n. 程度, 度數, 學位, 度

words.def: a tall perennial woody plant having a main trunk and branches forming a distinct elevated crown; includes both gymnosperms and angiosperms
words.zh: n. 樹, 木料, 樹狀物
n. 邊緣, 尖銳, 刀刃, 優勢

words.def: a return on a shot that seemed impossible to reach and would normally have resulted in a point for the opponent
words.zh: vt. 得到, 獲得, 變成, 使得, 收穫, 接通, 抓住, 染上

words.def: red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood
words.zh: a. 紅的, 紅色的, 紅腫的, 流血的
